dev.name: TradMotion
dev.mdl: Aqara human body movement and illuminance sensor (RTCGQ11LM)

sensor.am01_temperature.name: Temperatur
sensor.am01_temperature.val_tpl: {% if 'Motion' in value_json.ZbReceived and 'AqaraTemperature' in value_json.ZbReceived.Motion %}{{ value_json.ZbReceived.Motion.AqaraTemperature }}{% endif %}

sensor.am01_battery.name: Batterie
sensor.am01_battery.val_tpl: {% if 'Motion' in value_json.ZbReceived and 'BatteryPercentage' in value_json.ZbReceived.Motion %}{{ value_json.ZbReceived.Motion.BatteryPercentage }}{% endif %}
